name: BearingNAS: Obtaining In-Sensor Intelligent Fault Diagnosis Systems for Bearings Using a Laptop
summary: arXiv:2607.18287v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper introduces BearingNAS, a Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search (HW-NAS) framework designed to shift the intelligence directly onto t...
description: arXiv:2607.18287v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper introduces BearingNAS, a Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search (HW-NAS) framework designed to shift the intelligence directly onto the sensor die via in-sensor processing. BearingNAS frames the search as a constrained optimization problem targeting extreme micro-budgets (4 to 8 kiB of RAM and 16 to 32 kiB of Flash). To eliminate t...
author: Andrea Mattia Garavagno, Edoardo Ragusa, Paolo Gastaldo, Antonio Frisoli, Rodolfo Zunino
